## Test Results

npm run build

## Risk / Rollback Notes

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is focused on one issue
- [ ] Acceptance criteria are met
- [ ] Tests/checks pass locally
- [ ] UI tested in browser if UI changed
- [ ] No unrelated refactors
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] PR is ready for review
